prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 80 名（2026 年），近年排名稳中有升（2021 年第 82→2026 年第 80）；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用他人作品参赛），可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第 77（一般），短视频曝光量处于中低位；管理科学与工程 A，为该校唯一 A 级学科；招生专业中计算机类、电气类、机械类等工科专业与校本部共享学科资源，对考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏热；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 299000 人，较 2025 年（约 297258 人）微增约 0.6%，物理类考生估算约 208400 人，竞争略有加剧；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽宣城，属长三角腹地，对西南省份考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在贵州招生占比约 2.5%（2025 年物理类 50 人/全国计划），属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年物理类大幅扩招 22%（位次数字增大）、本省考生微增（竞争略加剧）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制热度）等因素；预测最低位次约 23317 名，区间 22817–23817 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 12680 → 19643 → 38093 → 22350 → 20580. In 2023, due to a gap, it dropped significantly to 38093 before quickly rebounding, stabilizing in the 20580–22350 range in recent years. The baseline for 2025 is about 20580. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 46 in 2021–2022, 47 in 2023, 50 in 2024–2025, and 61 in 2026, an increase of about 22% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 80th (2026), with a stable upward trend in recent years (82nd in 2021 → 80th in 2026). The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to academic misconduct incidents (students plagiarizing others' works for competitions), which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 77th (average), with short video exposure at a medium-low level. Management Science and Engineering is A-level, the only A-level discipline at the university. Among the enrollment majors, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering share disciplinary resources with the main campus, attracting some candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to be socially popular. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province for 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025 (about 297,258). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 208,400, with slightly intensified competition. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Xuancheng, Anhui, in the hinterland of the Yangtze River Delta, offering some regional appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 2.5% (50 Physics Category students in 2025 / national plan), which is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as a significant 22% expansion in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (increasing ranking numbers), a slight increase in provincial candidates (slightly intensified competition), and a slightly negative reputation (mildly suppressing enthusiasm), the predicted minimum ranking is about 23,317, with a range of 22,817–23,817.

- Software Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Process Equipment and Control Engineering
- Energy Chemical Engineering
- Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering
- Material Forming and Control Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Logistics Management
- Food Nutrition and Health
- Environmental Engineering
- Civil Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 22,817–23,817, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 22,500), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control and Software Engineering.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年文科组扩招 12.5%（位次数字增大）、本省历史类考生微增（竞争略加剧）、新闻传播类专业社会热度明显劝退（抑制报考意愿）等因素；预测最低位次约 4083 名，区间 3583–4583 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including liberal arts/history category) were approximately 2903→2519→2529→3214→3784. From 2021 to 2023, they stabilized in the 2500–2900 range, but from 2024 onward, they significantly shifted back to 3214–3784, with a continuous backward trend in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3784. The provincial liberal arts group plan had 6 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 8 in 2025, and is planned to be 9 in 2026, an expansion of about 12.5% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class; ranked approximately 80th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with a stable or slightly rising ranking in recent years. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to academic misconduct incidents), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 77th (average), with exposure at a medium-low level. Management Science and Engineering is rated A, but it has no direct disciplinary mapping to the liberal arts majors (Network and New Media, English).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Network and New Media belongs to the journalism and communication category, with significantly declining social popularity (the Zhang Xuefeng effect continues). English belongs to the foreign language category, with generally lukewarm social popularity. In 2026, the estimated number of history category examinees in the province is about 90,600 (based on the 2025 proportion of 30.3%), a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (90,087), leading to slightly intensified competition. The Xuancheng campus is located in Anhui, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Guizhou examinees. The liberal arts group of this university has a small enrollment in Guizhou (only 8 in 2025), making ranking fluctuations relatively sensitive due to the small scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 12.5% expansion of the liberal arts group in 2026 (increasing ranking numbers), a slight increase in provincial history category examinees (slightly intensified competition), and the significantly declining social popularity of journalism and communication majors (suppressing application willingness), the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4083, with a range of 3583–4583.

Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Network and New Media
- English.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The liberal arts group of this university only offers two majors: Network and New Media and English, with an extremely small enrollment (9 students in total in 2026). Within the predicted ranking range of 3583–4583, both majors can be considered as reach or match choices. It is recommended to fill in based on personal interests and foreign language abilities.
